creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
This update have plist problems:

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%EMACS_VERSION_SITE_LISPDIR%%/slime/contrib/swank.rb
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: %%EMACS_VERSION_SITE_LISPDIR%%/slime/contrib/slime-trace-dialog.el
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1
